description: This file contains test cases for the RiskDecisioningService in the BusinessLoanAPI project, specifically testing decision rules, scoring logic, and integration with the CreditBureauClient. It includes unit tests verifying behavior under different credit bureau responses and application scenarios.

classes.name: test_risk_decisioning_service_test
classes.description: JUnit test class for RiskDecisioningService decision logic, covering scenarios such as revenue-based decline, high-quality application, and identity mismatch outcomes.

methods.name: hardDecline_revenueNonPositive
methods.description: Tests that a non-positive revenue results in a decline decision with a score of zero and appropriate reason message.

methods.name: highQuality_preQualified
methods.description: Verifies that a high-quality application yields a PRE_QUALIFIED decision with a score of at least 80.

methods.name: identityMismatch_penalizesScore
methods.description: Checks that an identity mismatch from the credit bureau influences the decision, potentially leading to manual review.
